## Problem
What pain point does this solve?

## Proposed solution
Describe the CLI UX you imagine (command, flags, prompts).

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Extra context
Examples from other tools (`create-next-app`, `very_good_cli`, etc.) welcome.
